note: Post-plan supplementary cells (same day, after the pre-registered run; computed with the same frozen machinery, seed 0). Pre-registered results are in results.json and are untouched.

combined_probe.reading: identity repair (0.496) and rule patch (0.503) are NOT additive; combined 0.503 — the same ~0.50 ceiling, two faces of one seam failure

missing_rule_structure.reading: 6 of the 15 missing gold rules mention both an A-blind and a B-blind relation: NEITHER view can mine them alone; vote pooling cannot synthesize a triple no view witnessed in full

R_1_-.graded_committed_instead: R_1_- -> R_0_- (a wrong commit marrying a shared relation to an A-blind one)

graded_hub_postmortem.reading: the graded layer FOUND and COMMITTED the hub identity (S=0.62, mutual argmax, above HARD_SIM=0.5) and still scored 0.163: commits merge output symbols only; rules stay in native vocabularies bridged by multiplicative similarity (0.62^2 ~ 0.39 per bridged span), so activation decays toward ACT_MIN on multi-step derivations — the discovered identity is never cashable in derivation. An enrichment-semantics (D3/T6) datum, not an identity-discovery failure.

rule_head_quality.reading: wrong heads are few (6); the residual 0.50 -> 0.83 gap is NOT attributed by these probes — candidates are the 15 not-in-gold keys firing on paths, path-vote statistics over the seam rendering, and patched heads that re-cross the seam as intermediate symbols; left open, licensed for a follow-up cell if pursued

plan_premise_correction.claim_in_plan_s1: graded left rule_27 at 0.163 exactly - no test prediction moved
plan_premise_correction.measured: graded healed 22 discrete failures and broke 22 discrete successes; the 0.163-exactly was a COUNT coincidence, not immobility
plan_premise_correction.consequence: the plan's strongest motivation for elevating H3/H4 ('graded could not even perturb it') was overstated; the elevated priors were nonetheless vindicated by the attribution

data_provenance.note: the GraphLog v1.1 dataset was absent from this machine at diagnosis time (data/ is gitignored, original host cs.mcgill.ca/~ksinha4 returns 404); re-fetched from the author's re-upload linked in facebookresearch/GraphLog issues #34/#35
data_provenance.authenticity: established by the consistency gate: recomputed view-alone/ensemble/gold-pooled = 0.133/0.163/0.828, identical to the frozen bench artifacts, and graded_acc 0.163 identical to the frozen graded artifact
